# 🚀 Release v0.1-alpha — Initialisation du projet MySelf

## 🎯 Objectif
Poser la structure minimale du système MySelf.

## 📦 Contenu
- Architecture du projet
- Dossiers principaux
- Fichiers vides (core, goals, routines, tracking)
- README minimal

## ☑️ Checklist

### Structure
- [ ] `core/`
- [ ] `goals/`
- [ ] `routines/`
- [ ] `tracking/`

### Core
- [ ] `identity.md`
- [ ] `doctrine.md`
- [ ] `rules.md`

### Objectifs
- [ ] `short-term.md`
- [ ] `mid-term.md`
- [ ] `long-term.md`

### Routines
- [ ] `morning.md`
- [ ] `evening.md`
- [ ] `discipline.md`
- [ ] `health.md`

### Tracking
- [ ] `discipline.log`
- [ ] `health.log`
- [ ] `progress.md`

### README
- [ ] README minimal

## 🧪 Statut
Version **alpha** — structure posée, contenu à compléter.
